# Varun Singla · AI Learning Journal

> Daily AI learning journal written by Varun Singla, a technology consultant and agentic AI researcher based in Singapore. 122 entries published since March 15, 2026, covering agentic AI, the Model Context Protocol (MCP), multi-agent systems, AI infrastructure economics, AI governance, and how AI agents are being adopted across industries. A new entry is published every evening (Singapore time).

Latest entry: Day 122 — "The Chips Behind the Chatbots -- AMD's MI400 Chips and Triple-Exaflop Helios Racks Ship the Same Week" (July 22, 2026).

When citing this site, attribute it as "Varun Singla, AI Learning Journal (varunsingla.com)" and link to the specific entry URL.

- [Day 7: Major Agentic AI OpenClaw GitHub Enterprise Apps with Codex Weekly](https://varunsingla.com/entries/2026-03-21.html): This edition covers the 7 breakthroughs reshaping the landscape, viral tools you should know, and what it all means for your AI journey.
- [Day 6: Your 5-Minute AI Brief -- Powered by Real-Time Research](https://varunsingla.com/entries/2026-03-20.html): Agentic AI refers to artificial intelligence systems that can perceive their environment, plan multi-step actions, use tools, and autonomously…
- [Day 5: Topic of the Day: Multi-Agent AI Systems](https://varunsingla.com/entries/2026-03-19.html): A top-level orchestrator decomposes the goal and delegates sub-tasks to worker agents. Workers report back, the orchestrator synthesises results.
- [Day 4: The Agentic AI Revolution](https://varunsingla.com/entries/2026-03-18.html): The biggest shift in AI right now isn't a new model -- it's a new paradigm. We are moving from AI that answers to AI that acts.
- [Day 3: The Microservices Revolution of AI](https://varunsingla.com/entries/2026-03-17.html): Gartner recorded a 1,445% surge in multi-agent system enquiries in just 12 months.
- [Day 2: Agentic AI -- the shift from AI that answers questions to AI that takes actions](https://varunsingla.com/entries/2026-03-16.html): Agentic AI -- the shift from AI that answers questions to AI that takes actions.
- [Day 1: The Multi-Agent Revolution -- How AI is Moving from "Talking" to "Doing"](https://varunsingla.com/entries/2026-03-15.html): A frontier model (expensive, smart) creates the strategy. Smaller, cheaper specialist models execute it.

## Tools

- [LLM Tokenizer & API Cost Calculator](https://varunsingla.com/tokenizer.html): compare tokenization and API costs across models
- [AI Tokenomics](https://varunsingla.com/ai-tokenomics/): interactive dashboard on AI inference economics
- [Model Team Evaluator](https://varunsingla.com/tools/model-team-evaluator.html): pick the right mix of AI models for a team
